title: helianthemum thymifolium var. viride
intro: Helianthemum thymifolium var. viride, also known as rock rose, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the Cistaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Helianthemum thymifolium var. viride include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe skin irritations, and act as an antihistamine. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being used topically in the form of creams and ointments.
